summary: Re-verified ADR 0244 from the latest realistic origin/main baseline by replaying the authenticated API gateway and interactive ops portal on docker-runtime-lv3, fixing the duplicate gateway receipts sync and verify-token fallback defects, and correcting concurrent live drift until the exact-main runtime-assurance matrix matched the branch again.

verification.observed: The focused runtime-assurance, gateway, and portal pytest slice passed from the exact-main worktree, including `tests/test_runtime_assurance.py`, `tests/test_runtime_assurance_scoreboard.py`, `tests/test_api_gateway.py`, `tests/test_api_gateway_runtime_role.py`, `tests/test_interactive_ops_portal.py`, and `tests/test_ops_portal_runtime_role.py`.

verification.check: Runtime assurance and repository validation gates
verification.observed: `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema --with nats-py==2.11.0 python3 scripts/runtime_assurance.py --validate --print-report-json`, `make validate-data-models`, `make syntax-check-api-gateway`, `make preflight WORKFLOW=converge-api-gateway`, `make preflight WORKFLOW=converge-ops-portal`, and `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards` all passed from the isolated worktree.

On `docker-runtime-lv3`, `curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8083/healthz` returned `{"status":"ok"}`, `/opt/api-gateway/service/api_gateway/main.py` and `/app/api_gateway/main.py` in the running `api-gateway` container both matched branch hash `ce9f9ff50a64f2edbad20eced497f25efa5d5baffc2d181169c7025841b35853`, and the authenticated `GET /v1/platform/runtime-assurance` call returned `HTTP 200` with `45` bindings (`8` pass / `37` degraded / `0` failed / `0` unknown).

`curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8092/health` returned `{"status":"ok"}`, `/opt/ops-portal/service/ops_portal/app.py` and `/app/ops_portal/app.py` in the running `ops-portal` container both matched branch hash `b340da9477044e486d0a66ef9b02b8c054592a13639e7eb066959d9778033661`, and `curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8092/partials/runtime-assurance` returned `HTTP 200`, rendered the `45`-binding summary, exposed the bindings table, and omitted the degraded-data banner.
`curl -k -I https://ops.example.com` returned `HTTP 302` to `https://ops.example.com/oauth2/sign_in?rd=https://ops.example.com/` and preserved the expected hardening headers after the live replay.

The strengthened gateway verify caught a real concurrent replay race when another worktree briefly restored an older `api_gateway/main.py` that returned `HTTP 404` for `/v1/platform/runtime-assurance`; the exact-main replay corrected that drift. During the same window, `/` on `docker-runtime-lv3` filled to `100%` with only about `57M` free, so apt, journal, and Docker caches were cleaned per the runbook, free space recovered to about `24G`, `apt-get update -o Acquire::Retries=0` succeeded again, and the repo-managed converges were rerun to completion.

notes: ADR 0244 itself was first implemented earlier on the branch-local replay; this receipt records the later exact-main revalidation from repo version 0.177.78 on top of the already-current platform baseline 0.130.53 before the final protected-surface merge step.

The exact-main replay corrected concurrent live drift, removed the duplicate gateway receipts copy that could hang apply, and hardened the gateway verify path so a failed Keycloak client-credentials exchange falls back to the legacy platform-context token instead of blocking runtime verification.

No manual service-tree repair was retained after the disk-pressure recovery on docker-runtime-lv3; space was reclaimed only to restore guest health, and the repo-managed converges were rerun until the guest and container hashes matched the branch again.

This exact-main receipt is the canonical live evidence carried into `main` by release `0.177.79`, and platform version `0.130.54` is the first integrated platform version that records the merged ADR 0244 runtime-assurance replay.
